cards.idea: Create short-form video content showcasing drink-making, seasonal specials, and behind-the-scenes moments on Instagram and TikTok to build social proof and drive foot traffic.
cards.whyItFitsYou: Camino Coffee can leverage trending video content formats to enhance social media presence and attract both local community members and Las Vegas visitors seeking authentic, engaging brand experiences.

evidence.claim: Social media trends for coffee shops include drink-making videos, funny and relatable content, aesthetic imagery, and customized cups that significantly enhance brand awareness on social media
evidence.sourceName: Social Media Trends For Coffee Shops

evidence.claim: Use Instagram, TikTok, and micro-influencers to showcase seasonal drinks, behind-the-scenes moments, and customer stories that build social proof and brand affinity
evidence.sourceName: 17 Coffee Shop Marketing Ideas to Boost Sales in 2026

executionSteps: Film 2-3 short videos per week featuring drink preparation, latte art, and seasonal menu items
Post consistently across Instagram Reels and TikTok using trending sounds and hashtags relevant to Las Vegas coffee culture
Encourage staff to share behind-the-scenes moments and customer interactions to build authentic community connection

cards.idea: Establish a 'Business of the Day' partnership program with nearby Las Vegas businesses, offering their staff unlimited free coffee one day per month to generate word-of-mouth advertising and cross-customer traffic.
cards.whyItFitsYou: This low-cost local partnership strategy directly addresses Camino Coffee's goals to increase foot traffic while leveraging Las Vegas's dense downtown business community and building authentic relationships with neighboring organizations.

evidence.claim: Offer to make a local business the 'Business of the Day,' where you provide their staff with unlimited free coffee for one day. It also generates word-of-mouth advertising—people love to talk about unique perks they've received, and this initiative can create a buzz in your local community.
evidence.sourceName: 10 Marketing Tips for your Coffee Shop in 2024

evidence.claim: The most powerful, authentic, and cost-effective marketing lies in partnering with the other local businesses around you. When the boutique down the street recommends your coffee, it's a trusted endorsement from a fellow local.
evidence.sourceName: The Power of Local Partnerships: Cross-Promoting Your Coffee Shop

executionSteps: Identify and contact 5-10 neighboring Las Vegas businesses within walking distance to pitch the monthly partnership
Schedule first 'Business of the Day' and track foot traffic and new customer acquisition
Document and share the partner business's experience on social media to amplify word-of-mouth effect

cards.idea: Study Mothership Coffee Roasters' community-focused business model and ethical sourcing approach to inform Camino Coffee's positioning as a locally-rooted, values-driven alternative to chains.
cards.whyItFitsYou: Mothership operates in Las Vegas's independent coffee ecosystem and has successfully built community identity through farm-to-table practices and passionate roasting, providing a proven comparable for how Camino Coffee can differentiate and strengthen local loyalty.

evidence.claim: Mothership Coffee Roasters was started in the heart of Sunrise Coffee, the longest running independent coffee shop in Las Vegas, by Juanny Romero and Josh Walter. Mothership Coffee Roasters has been the darling of the community with a focus on ethical farming, farm to table pastries and passionate pursuit of roasting the best coffee.
evidence.sourceName: The Mothership Serves Coffee and Community | U.S. Small Business Administration

comparables.name: Mothership Coffee Roasters
comparables.whyComparable: Established Las Vegas independent coffee shop that has built strong community reputation through ethical sourcing, farm-to-table practices, and passionate craft focus while operating as a growth-stage small business.
notablePlays: Focus on ethical farming and fair-trade sourcing
Community-centric brand identity that differentiates from chains
Scaled from startup to 50+ employees while maintaining independent identity

executionSteps: Research and document Mothership's sourcing partners, pastry suppliers, and community engagement initiatives
Identify 2-3 ethical sourcing or local partnership opportunities aligned with Camino Coffee's values and audience
Develop and communicate Camino Coffee's unique community value proposition across social media and in-store messaging
